inputDomain: CalculusExpr over RationalExpr with explicit domainConditions
outputRelation: Formal candidate identity (deriv / antideriv / recurrence / ODE+IC)
performanceNotes: Formal polynomial identity only; no transcendental calculus.
knownLimitations: Candidate validity never implies completeness or uniqueness.
Identity at poles is never claimed; domainConditions are mandatory for divisions.
